languages.text: "Признаться, трудно поверить. Рядом с Себерианом я видела вещи, способные смутить даже стойкий разум. Но если вы не лжете, это превзойдет их все".

traits.locale_text: "Признаться, трудно поверить. Рядом с Себерианом я видела вещи, способные смутить даже стойкий разум. Но если вы не лжете, это превзойдет их все".

languages.text: "I struggle to believe it, to be honest. At Seberian's side, I have witnessed many things that would confound even the most sound mind. But if you are not lying, this will outdo them all."
languages.original_text: "Признаться, трудно поверить. Рядом с Себерианом я видела вещи, способные смутить даже стойкий разум. Но если вы не лжете, это превзойдет их все".

traits.locale_text: "I struggle to believe it, to be honest. At Seberian's side, I have witnessed many things that would confound even the most sound mind. But if you are not lying, this will outdo them all."
"I struggle to believe it, to be honest. At Seberian's side, I have witnessed many things that would confound even the most sound mind. But if you are not lying, this will outdo them all."
"I struggle to believe it, to be honest. At Seberian's side, I have witnessed many things that would confound even the most sound mind. But if you are not lying, this will outdo them all."

languages.text: “说实话，我很难相信。跟在塞贝里安身边，我见过太多离谱的事，足以让最理智的人都不知所措。但你要是没撒谎，那这件事比之前所有事都要离谱。”
languages.original_text: "I struggle to believe it, to be honest. At Seberian's side, I have witnessed many things that would confound even the most sound mind. But if you are not lying, this will outdo them all."

traits.locale_text: “说实话，我很难相信。跟在塞贝里安身边，我见过太多离谱的事，足以让最理智的人都不知所措。但你要是没撒谎，那这件事比之前所有事都要离谱。”

languages.text: « Pour être tout à fait franche, j'ai du mal à y croire. En tant que bras droit de Seberian, j'ai vu bien des choses qui confondraient le plus rationnel des esprits. Mais si vous dites vrai, celle-ci les surpasse toutes réunies. »
languages.original_text: "I struggle to believe it, to be honest. At Seberian's side, I have witnessed many things that would confound even the most sound mind. But if you are not lying, this will outdo them all."

traits.locale_text: « Pour être tout à fait franche, j'ai du mal à y croire. En tant que bras droit de Seberian, j'ai vu bien des choses qui confondraient le plus rationnel des esprits. Mais si vous dites vrai, celle-ci les surpasse toutes réunies. »

languages.text: "Açıkçası hikâyenize inanmakta zorlanıyorum. Seberian'ın yanında, en aklı başında olanı bile hayrete düşürecek pek çok şeye tanık oldum. Fakat doğru söylüyorsanız bu olay, hepsini gölgede bırakır."
languages.original_text: "I struggle to believe it, to be honest. At Seberian's side, I have witnessed many things that would confound even the most sound mind. But if you are not lying, this will outdo them all."

traits.locale_text: "Açıkçası hikâyenize inanmakta zorlanıyorum. Seberian'ın yanında, en aklı başında olanı bile hayrete düşürecek pek çok şeye tanık oldum. Fakat doğru söylüyorsanız bu olay, hepsini gölgede bırakır."

languages.text: «Me cuesta creerlo, a decir verdad. Junto a Seberian, he presenciado muchas cosas que podrían dejar sin palabras a la mente más brillante. Pero, si no miente, esta hará que las demás parezcan inocentadas».
languages.original_text: "I struggle to believe it, to be honest. At Seberian's side, I have witnessed many things that would confound even the most sound mind. But if you are not lying, this will outdo them all."

traits.locale_text: «Me cuesta creerlo, a decir verdad. Junto a Seberian, he presenciado muchas cosas que podrían dejar sin palabras a la mente más brillante. Pero, si no miente, esta hará que las demás parezcan inocentadas».

languages.text: "Es fällt mir ehrlich gesagt schwer, Euch zu glauben. Ich habe an Seberians Seite viele Dinge erlebt, die jeden noch so gesunden Verstand verwirren würden. Aber falls Ihr nicht lügt, übertrifft das alles."
languages.original_text: "I struggle to believe it, to be honest. At Seberian's side, I have witnessed many things that would confound even the most sound mind. But if you are not lying, this will outdo them all."

traits.locale_text: "Es fällt mir ehrlich gesagt schwer, Euch zu glauben. Ich habe an Seberians Seite viele Dinge erlebt, die jeden noch so gesunden Verstand verwirren würden. Aber falls Ihr nicht lügt, übertrifft das alles."

languages.text: 正直、私は信じられない。シベリアの側では、健全な精神でも混乱するような多くのことを目にしてきた。だが、あなたが嘘をついていないなら、これはそれらを上回るだろう。
languages.original_text: "I struggle to believe it, to be honest. At Seberian's side, I have witnessed many things that would confound even the most sound mind. But if you are not lying, this will outdo them all."

traits.locale_text: 正直、私は信じられない。シベリアの側では、健全な精神でも混乱するような多くのことを目にしてきた。だが、あなたが嘘をついていないなら、これはそれらを上回るだろう。
